_comment: Algo-D W2 source_manifest.json template. Required fields (per taxonomy_release_builder.REQUIRED_SOURCE_MANIFEST_FIELDS): release_id, jurisdiction, program, submodule_counts, official_expected_count, source_files, source_version_date, license_note, mapping_notes. Place under backend/data/taxonomy_sources/<release_id>/<jurisdiction>/<program>/source_manifest.json. source_files[].path must resolve under backend/data/taxonomy_releases/<release_id>/.

source_files.notes: 国家重点保护野生动植物名录 2021 (980 动物 + 8 植物); only the 980 vertebrate entries map into this manifest's submodule_counts; the 8 plant entries go to the plants source manifest

source_files.source_url: https://www.hainan.gov.cn/  (search for 海南省重点保护野生动植物名录 2024)
source_files.notes: 海南省级保护名录 2024 (212 动物 + 206 植物); animals are vertebrate-mostly, contributing to mainland_china/terrestrial_vertebrates; plants belong to plants source manifest
不是新种、是给已有种打 IUCN 标签；ingestion 时 merge 到 red_list_status 字段

license_note: 国家公告均在公开域；本平台仅做学术研究/调查 metadata 用途；引用时请保留原始公告链接
mapping_notes: 本 release 拼装规则: 1) national_protection_2021 vertebrate 部分按 protection_level (I/II) 映射到 national_protection_status; 2) hainan_protection_2024 animal 部分按 hainan_provincial 映射到 provincial_protection_status; 3) china_red_list_vertebrates_2016 按 scientific_name match 上 red_list_status; 重名按 IOC v14 优先
